title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your business settings and preferences

error.settingLocked: This setting can only be changed once and is now locked.

businessHoursNote: These hours will be displayed to customers and used for scheduling
previewText: This is how your brand colors will look in the application
manageTeamDesc: Manage your team members and their permissions
permissionCodeError: Must match format: resource:action (lowercase letters and underscores only)
cannotDeleteAssignedPermission: Cannot delete a permission assigned to roles
manageRolesDesc: Create and manage roles with granular permissions

roles.title: Roles Management
roles.description: Manage roles and permissions for your organization

workflowRoles.title: Workflow Roles
workflowRoles.description: Manage workflow role assignments for users

manageWorkflowRolesDesc: Assign workflow roles to users for operational access
roleAdminDesc: Full access to all features, settings, and user management
roleOperatorDesc: Can manage orders, customers, and perform operational tasks
roleViewerDesc: Read-only access to view orders and customers
roleManagerDesc: All staff permissions plus reports and settings
roleOwnerDesc: Full access to all features and billing
saveError: Could not save settings. Please try again.
confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this user?
confirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate this user?
cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account
teamLoadError: Could not load team members. Please refresh and try again.
inviteSuccess: User was created. Ask them to use Forgot password on the sign-in page to set their password, unless your platform sends an invite email.
inviteError: Could not create user. Check permissions and try again.
invitePasswordHint: A secure temporary password is set by the system. The user should use Forgot password on the sign-in page to choose their own password unless invite email is enabled on the platform.
passwordResetUnavailable: Password reset from this screen is not available yet. Use your platform admin tools, or ask the user to use Forgot password on the sign-in page.
teamActionError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
emailReadOnlyHint: Email cannot be changed from here.
confirmDeactivateMember: Deactivate {email}? They will no longer be able to sign in.
confirmActivateMember: Activate {email}? They will be able to sign in again.

tenantSettings.title: Tenant Settings
tenantSettings.description: Configure organization-wide settings and pricing modes
tenantSettings.pricingDescription: Control how tax and extra prices are applied across all orders for this tenant

branchSettings.title: Branch Settings
branchSettings.description: Configure settings per branch. Each branch can override the tenant-level defaults.
branchSettings.pricingDescription: Override pricing modes for this branch. Select "Inherit from tenant" to use the tenant default.

pricingMode.taxPricingModeDesc: How tax is applied to order items
pricingMode.extraPricePricingModeDesc: How extra prices are presented on orders
pricingMode.taxExclusiveDesc: Tax is added on top of the item price
pricingMode.taxInclusiveDesc: Tax is embedded within the item price
pricingMode.includedInItemPriceDesc: Extra price is part of the item total
pricingMode.separateChargeDesc: Extra price is shown as a separate line item
pricingMode.inheritNote: Leave unset to inherit from tenant
